headerDisplay: Godox TL30 BLE plugin. Exposes lights as HomeKit accessories with brightness, color temperature, HomeKit color, and optional FX/RGBW preset switches.
footerDisplay: Provisioned lights are stored under the Homebridge storage directory by default. Set `registryPath` to share a CLI registry, or enable auto-provision below.

registryPath.title: Registry path
registryPath.description: Path to the godox-tl registry JSON. Leave empty to store registry and state files under the Homebridge storage directory. Set this to a CLI registry path only when the Homebridge user can read and write the registry and state files.

autoProvision.title: Periodic auto-provision
autoProvision.description: Continuously scans for factory-reset lights after startup. Leave off for normal control.

startupScan.title: Scan once on startup
startupScan.description: Runs one BLE scan when Homebridge starts, before accessories are reconciled.

startupPruneMissing.title: Remove missing lights after startup scan
startupPruneMissing.description: If enabled and the startup scan sees Godox lights, registry entries not seen in that scan are removed and their HomeKit accessories are unregistered. Leave off for normal BLE use; short scans can miss nearby lights.

autoProvisionOnStartup.title: Auto-provision on startup scan
autoProvisionOnStartup.description: During the one startup scan, provision matching factory-reset lights even when periodic auto-provision is off. Leave disabled unless you are intentionally onboarding factory-reset lights.

nameTemplate.title: Auto-provisioned name template
nameTemplate.description: Used when auto-provisioning. `{shortAddr}` expands to the last 6 hex chars of the BLE address.

enableColor.title: Expose HomeKit color controls
enableColor.description: Adds Hue and Saturation characteristics backed by Godox HSI mode.

fxPresets.title: FX preset switches
fxPresets.description: Optional momentary HomeKit switches. Turning one on sends a Godox FX command, then resets the switch off.

rgbwPresets.title: RGBW preset switches
rgbwPresets.description: Optional momentary HomeKit switches. Turning one on sends raw Godox RGBW channel values, then resets the switch off.
